tags: 65k mi, full Mazda service history, no accidents. Asking 15,000 EUR. Pickup in Prague.
content:
Bought new from Mazda CZ in March 2018. Single owner, garaged, non-smoker. Full dealer service history (every 15k km at official Mazda service in Prague-Karlín). No accidents, no panel repaints, no rust. Recently passed STK (Czech MOT) with no issues, valid until 2026-04. New tires (Continental PremiumContact) at 60k km, less than 5,000 km on them. Selling because the family is moving abroad. Open to inspection at any pre-purchase shop in Prague. Open to offers but the price reflects condition.

Photos and inspection report available on request via ACP session.
